title: assistant_message carries the model's text output under avp.content
description: The model's per-turn output is reconstructable from the wire: an assistant_message MUST carry the produced content blocks under avp.content, including at least one text block when the model replied with text. Asserted with $contains so it holds regardless of how many blocks the turn produced. Replaces the retired text_emitted event (text now lives inside avp.content).

commission.prompt: Reply with exactly the word DONE and nothing else.

events.label: assistant_message content includes a text block
